name: prompt-optimizer
description: LLM prompt quality reviewer and optimizer. Scores your prompts against a research-backed 10-item checklist and returns a revised version with every violation fixed.

plugins.name: prompt-optimizer
plugins.description: Scores and revises LLM prompts against a research-backed checklist. Based on AGENTIF (NeurIPS 2025), ACL 2025 self-correction research, and HuggingFace LLM-as-judge benchmarks.
